fact: Autonomous Futures Bot project created with separate PRD from equity trading bot. Uses Tradovate broker (futures-focused API) instead of Alpaca. Initial contracts: /ES, /NQ, /CL, /GC, /SI, /ZN.
Project renamed (Mar 5, 2026): autonomous-futures-bot → futures-bot (shorter name). All references updated in PRD, TOOLS.md, memory files.
Phase 1 build complete (Mar 5, 22:20 ICT): 1,349 lines of code, 10/10 milestones, 10/10 tests passing. Built by Codex in 8 minutes.
Phase 1 testing complete (Mar 5, 22:50 ICT): 14/14 tests passed (100%). Contract mapping, risk management, security, idempotency, state persistence all validated in dry-run mode.
IBKR integration path selected (Mar 5, 23:00 ICT): Tradovate API costs $25/month, IBKR free for paper trading. IBKR application submitted, pending approval (1-3 business days).
Pre-Market Trading Brief System launched (Mar 6, 2026): Daily brief at 8:00 PM ICT featuring sharp movers >3%, catalyst analysis, sentiment, and actionable insights. Telegram DM delivery configured.
